seoTitle: Kurting vs Kurunjang — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Kurting and Kurunjang. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kurting and Kurunjang.
heading: Kurting vs Kurunjang — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kurting, Victoria and Kurunjang, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kurting and Kurunjang have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Kurting or Kurunjang safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kurting has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Kurunjang scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kurting scores 50/100 for bushfire risk. Kurunjang scores 47/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kurting or Kurunjang?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kurting has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
